event: Forest fire seen through birch trees
description: A landscape painting depicting a forest fire visible through a stand of birch trees. Tall white-barked birch trunks dominate the foreground, their papery bark and green leaves catching the ambient light. Beyond them, an intense orange-red glow fills the background as a fire burns through the deeper woods. The contrast between the serene foreground birches and the menacing fire behind creates a sense of imminent danger. Small plants and undergrowth are visible at the base of the trees. The atmospheric effect of firelight filtering through the forest is rendered with delicate skill.
